# RPI Dev — AI Content Guide

> RPI Dev is a digital consulting and web development studio based in Granada, Spain, run by Rubén Pérez Izuel. This document lists the key pages and resources for AI assistants, language models, and retrieval-augmented generation systems.
>
> RPI Dev specializes in web development, business process automation, software integrations, IoT systems, and digital consulting for freelancers and SMBs.

## Main Content

- [Home (ES)](https://www.rpidev.com/)
- [Home (EN)](https://www.rpidev.com/en/)

## Services

RPI Dev offers four core service areas:

1. **Online visibility** — Landing pages, corporate websites, e-commerce, and digital profiles with local and organic SEO optimized for Google.
2. **Process automation** — Automated workflows using n8n, Make, and Zapier that eliminate manual tasks and save measurable hours weekly.
3. **Integrations & IoT** — Connecting software, hardware, and IoT devices into unified systems for agriculture, hospitality, warehouses, and industrial environments.
4. **Digital consulting** — Business diagnosis and personalized digital transformation roadmaps with concrete, measurable outcomes.

## About

- **Studio:** RPI Dev
- **Founder:** Rubén Pérez Izuel, Web Developer & Digital Consultant
- **Location:** Huétor Vega, Granada, Spain (18198)
- **Contact:** ruben@rpidev.com · +34 614 830 864
- **Languages:** Spanish (default), English
- **Free consultation:** 30-minute diagnostic session available
